column1: # This table includes qualifying fusion and splice variant events reported by the LocalApp pipeline. To quality, an event needs to have either a) a positive numeric "Score" value or b) the "LocalApp_Reported" value set to "True" (the latter applies only to fusion events).
# Field legend (tags "[F]", "[S]" and "[FS]" specify that given field/text applies to fusion events only, splice events only and both event types, respectively):
# - [FS] "Provisional_Event_Type": event type as suggested by the LocalApp; one of ["Fusion", "Splice_variant"];
# - [FS] "Event_Type": final, QC-based decision regarding the event type; one of ["Fusion", "Splice_variant"];
